description: One agent-native CLI over USDA FoodData Central and NutritionValue.org - with cross-source enrichment, protein-density comparison, nutrient ranking, and a local SQLite cache no other nutrition tool ships.

tools.name: food_get
tools.description: Retrieves a single food item by an FDC ID. Optional format and nutrients can be specified. Required: fdcId. Optional: format, nutrients.

params.name: fdcId
params.description: FDC id of the food to retrieve

params.name: format
params.description: Optional. 'abridged' for an abridged set of elements, 'full' for all elements (default).

params.name: nutrients
params.description: Optional. List of up to 25 nutrient numbers. Only the nutrient information for the specified nutrients will be returned. Should be comma separated list (e.g. nutrients=203,204) or repeating parameters (e.g. nutrients=203&nutrients=204). If a food does not have any matching nutrients, the food will be returned with an empty foodNutrients element.

tools.name: foods_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of food items by a list of up to 20 FDC IDs. Optional format and nutrients can be specified. Invalid FDC ID's or ones that are not found are omitted and an empty set is returned if there are no matches. Required: fdcIds. Optional: format, nutrients. Returns array of FoodsGetItem.

params.name: fdcIds
params.description: List of multiple FDC ID's. Should be comma separated list (e.g. fdcIds=534358,373052) or repeating parameters (e.g. fdcIds=534358&fdcIds=373052).

params.name: format
params.description: Optional. 'abridged' for an abridged set of elements, 'full' for all elements (default).

params.name: nutrients
params.description: Optional. List of up to 25 nutrient numbers. Only the nutrient information for the specified nutrients will be returned. Should be comma separated list (e.g. nutrients=203,204) or repeating parameters (e.g. nutrients=203&nutrients=204). If a food does not have any matching nutrients, the food will be returned with an empty foodNutrients element.

tools.name: foods_get-list
tools.description: Retrieves a paged list of foods. Use the pageNumber parameter to page through the entire result set. Optional: dataType, pageSize, pageNumber (plus 2 more). Returns array of AbridgedFoodItem.

params.name: dataType
params.description: Optional. Filter on a specific data type; specify one or more values in an array.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return for the current page. Default is 50.

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Optional. Page number to retrieve. The offset into the overall result set is expressed as...

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Optional. Specify one of the possible values to sort by that field. Note, dataType.keyword...

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Optional. The sort direction for the results. Only applicable if sortBy is specified.

tools.name: foods_get-search
tools.description: Search for foods using keywords. Results can be filtered by dataType and there are options for result page sizes or sorting. Required: query. Optional: dataType, pageSize, pageNumber (plus 3 more). Returns array of SearchResult.

params.name: query
params.description: One or more search terms. The string may include [search operators](https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/help.html#bkmk-2)

params.name: dataType
params.description: Optional. Filter on a specific data type; specify one or more values in an array.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return for the current page. Default is 50.

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Optional. Page number to retrieve. The offset into the overall result set is expressed as...

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Optional. Specify one of the possible values to sort by that field. Note, dataType.keyword...

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Optional. The sort direction for the results. Only applicable if sortBy is specified.

params.name: brandOwner
params.description: Optional. Filter results based on the brand owner of the food. Only applies to Branded Foods

tools.name: foods_post
tools.description: Retrieves a list of food items by a list of up to 20 FDC IDs. Optional format and nutrients can be specified. Invalid FDC ID's or ones that are not found are omitted and an empty set is returned if there are no matches. Optional: fdcIds, format, nutrients. Returns array of FoodsPostItem.

params.name: fdcIds
params.description: List of multiple FDC ID's

params.name: format
params.description: Optional. 'abridged' for an abridged set of elements, 'full' for all elements (default).

params.name: nutrients
params.description: Optional. List of up to 25 nutrient numbers. Only the nutrient information for the specified nutrients will be returned. If a food does not have any matching nutrients, the food will be returned with an empty foodNutrients element.

tools.name: foods_post-list
tools.description: Retrieves a paged list of foods. Use the pageNumber parameter to page through the entire result set. Optional: dataType, pageNumber, pageSize (plus 2 more). Returns array of AbridgedFoodItem.

params.name: dataType
params.description: Optional. Filter on a specific data type; specify one or more values in an array.

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Optional. Page number to retrieve. The offset into the overall result set is expressed as...

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return for the current page. Default is 50.

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Optional. Specify one of the possible values to sort by that field. Note, dataType.keyword...

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Optional. The sort direction for the results. Only applicable if sortBy is specified.

tools.name: foods_post-search
tools.description: Search for foods using keywords. Results can be filtered by dataType and there are options for result page sizes or sorting. Optional: brandOwner, dataType, pageNumber (plus 4 more). Returns array of SearchResult.

params.name: brandOwner
params.description: Optional. Filter results based on the brand owner of the food. Only applies to Branded Foods.

params.name: dataType
params.description: Optional. Filter on a specific data type; specify one or more values in an array.

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Optional. Page number to retrieve. The offset into the overall result set is expressed as...

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return for the current page. Default is 50.

params.name: query
params.description: Search terms to use in the search. The string may also include standard [search operators](https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/help.html#bkmk-2)

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Optional. Specify one of the possible values to sort by that field. Note, dataType.keyword...

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Optional. The sort direction for the results. Only applicable if sortBy is specified.

tools.name: json-spec_get
tools.description: The OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the FDC API rendered as JSON (JavaScript Object Notation).

tools.name: yaml-spec_get
tools.description: The OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the FDC API rendered as YAML (YAML Ain't Markup Language).
